help.title: SapMall Help Center
help.tagline: Connect your wallet, swap SAP, shop the marketplace, and join the community—on-chain commerce and governance, explained in one place.

hero.quickNavHint: Jump to app areas or related guides

help.searchPlaceholder: Search topics, e.g. deposit, payment failed, wallet…

guide.selectTopic: Select a topic above to view related questions and answers

help.empty: No matches. Try another keyword or browse categories.
help.ctaDesc: Reach us via live chat, email, or community channels.

support.title: Contact & support
support.hint: Still stuck? Pick a channel below for human assistance.

liveChat.title: Live chat
liveChat.desc: Real-time replies on business days, ~3 min avg. response

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.desc: Product ideas, UX issues, and feature requests

community.title: Community
community.desc: Discuss with others in the DAO forum

onboardingSteps: Connect wallet in the header and sign in
Swap stablecoins to SAP on Exchange
Shop the marketplace and pay with SAP

liveChat.title: SapMall Live Chat
liveChat.welcome: Hi! I'm SapMall support. Describe your issue (wallet, orders, SAP swap, etc.) and I'll help as soon as I can.
liveChat.placeholder: Type a message, Enter to send…

replies.default: Thanks for your message. Share wallet address, order ID, or TxHash if you have one. For urgent cases, email support@sapmall.io.
replies.wallet: Wallet: unlock the extension, match the network, disconnect the site and reconnect. Never share seed phrase or private key.
replies.order: Orders: send order ID and TxHash, and whether it's pending payment, delivery, or refund—we'll follow policy.
replies.exchange: Swaps & gas: check balance, allowance, and slippage; inspect revert reason in the wallet before retrying.
replies.merchant: Merchants: tell us your stage (review, deposit, listing) and any admin message or TxHash.
replies.dao: DAO: verify proposal links and contracts before voting; power follows each snapshot rule.
replies.human: For deeper follow-up, leave email or Telegram with order ID and a short summary.

toast.chatSoon: Live chat is coming soon. Please use email or community channels.
toast.feedbackOpening: Thanks—describe your feedback in the email.
toast.ticketOpening: Ticket email ready—include order ID and details.

walletConnect.a: Check: ① extension installed and unlocked; ② correct network; ③ refresh and click Connect again; ④ approve the site in the wallet popup. Clear site data or try another browser if needed.

txFail.q: Why did my on-chain transaction fail?
txFail.a: Common causes: low gas, congestion, insufficient balance, or low slippage. Increase gas, wait, verify balance, or adjust slippage on Exchange and retry.

sapPay.a: SAP payments may receive fee discounts and campaign benefits with a shorter settlement path versus stablecoin-only checkout.

refund.q: When will I get a refund after canceling?
refund.a: Refunds follow your payment method and on-chain confirmations. Track status under Transaction history in the user menu.

deposit.q: How do merchants pay the deposit?
deposit.a: After admin approval, follow the guide to the Exchange deposit section, pay in SAP on-chain, and keep the TxHash for records.

daoVote.q: How do I vote on DAO proposals?
daoVote.a: Connect wallet, open Community, read active proposals, and submit an on-chain vote within the voting window per proposal rules.

firstBuy.q: What do I need for my first purchase?
firstBuy.a: Connect wallet → swap SAP → pick a product → pay with SAP. Start with a small order to learn gas and confirmation times.

virtualItem.a: Virtual items are for in-app use; digital rights/NFT products may include on-chain proof—read product details before buying.

newbie3min.title: Get started in 3 minutes
newbie3min.summary: Wallet → SAP → first order on the marketplace.
newbie3min.p1: SapMall is a Web3 marketplace for virtual goods. Follow these three steps:
steps: Click Connect wallet in the header and sign
Open Exchange and swap stablecoins to SAP
Browse Marketplace and pay with SAP
newbie3min.tip: Try a small SAP amount for your first order to learn gas and confirmations.

firstPurchase.title: Your first order
firstPurchase.summary: From product page to on-chain payment.
firstPurchase.p1: Browse products, confirm details on the product page, then checkout.
steps: Ensure wallet is connected with enough SAP
Submit the order and confirm in your wallet
Track status in orders / transaction history after confirmation

walletConnectFail.title: Fix wallet connection issues
walletConnectFail.p1: Failures are usually wallet state, network, or site permissions.
steps: Confirm the extension is enabled and unlocked
Verify chain ID matches platform requirements
Disconnect the site and reconnect with a new signature
Try incognito or another browser
walletConnectFail.warn: Never enter your seed phrase on unknown links.

protectKey.title: Protect keys and assets
protectKey.p1: Asset safety depends on keeping keys and seed phrases private.
steps: Back up seed phrases offline only—never share or screenshot
Use a hardware wallet for larger holdings
Verify domain and tx params before every signature
Beware fake support and phishing sites
protectKey.warn: SapMall staff will never ask for your seed phrase.

stablecoinSap.title: Swap stablecoins to SAP
stablecoinSap.summary: USDT/USDC and more with approve + swap.
stablecoinSap.p1: On Exchange, pick input token and amount, preview rate and fees, then confirm.
steps: Connect wallet and select a supported stablecoin
Enter amount and approve (first time requires Approve)
Confirm swap and wait for on-chain confirmation
Use SAP in marketplace and platform flows

sapFees.title: SAP payment fees
sapFees.summary: Discounts and campaigns for SAP checkout.
sapFees.p1: SAP settlement may qualify for fee reductions; see Exchange and campaigns for current rates.
sapFees.tip: Check ecosystem campaigns for fee announcements on large or frequent trades.

browseGoods.title: Browse and buy virtual goods
browseGoods.summary: Categories, product pages, and SAP checkout.
browseGoods.p1: The marketplace lists virtual items and digital rights—read delivery notes on each product.
steps: Filter or search the product list
Open details to verify price, stock, and terms
Pay with SAP and save the TxHash for reference

digitalRights.title: Digital rights & NFT products
digitalRights.p1: Some items deliver on-chain credentials or codes—see the product page for timing.
digitalRights.tip: Redeem codes before expiry; late redemption may fail.

merchantDeposit.title: Pay merchant deposit
merchantDeposit.p1: After KYC/approval, you'll be guided to pay the deposit in SAP.
steps: Submit credentials in merchant admin
Open Exchange deposit section per guide
Pay required SAP on-chain and record TxHash
Wait for confirmation to update status

merchantAdmin.title: Merchant admin basics
merchantAdmin.summary: Products, orders, and deposit in one portal.
merchantAdmin.p1: Access the embedded merchant admin from the header when you have permission.

orderRefund.title: Cancel orders & refunds
orderRefund.p1: Eligible cancellations refund via the original path; on-chain refunds need confirmations.
steps: Cancel from order details when allowed
Track refund in Transaction history
Balance updates after on-chain completion

txhash.title: Look up TxHash on explorer
txhash.p1: Every on-chain action has a unique transaction hash (TxHash).
steps: Copy TxHash from history or wallet
Open the network block explorer
Paste hash to view status and confirmations
txhash.tip: Wait for pending txs—avoid duplicate orders.

daoVote.title: Vote on DAO proposals
daoVote.p1: Governance lives under Community; voting power rules vary per proposal.
steps: Connect wallet and open Community
Read background, options, and deadline
Submit an on-chain vote within the window

joinCommunity.title: Join the SapMall community
joinCommunity.p1: Get announcements, campaigns, and peer support in our channels.

connectWalletBasics.title: Connect MetaMask and other wallets
connectWalletBasics.summary: Browser extension wallets are supported; one signature verifies your session.
connectWalletBasics.p1: Click Connect wallet in the header, pick your installed wallet, and approve plus sign.

gasFeesBeginner.title: What is on-chain gas
gasFeesBeginner.summary: Gas pays miners/validators and is separate from order totals; it rises when the network is busy.
gasFeesBeginner.p1: Keep a small amount of native token (e.g. ETH) in the wallet to cover network fees.

sapRewardsIntro.title: SAP points and ecosystem rewards
sapRewardsIntro.summary: Shopping, swaps, and campaigns may earn benefits—see the rewards page for rules.
sapRewardsIntro.p1: Open Ecosystem rewards for tasks and payout history; rules may depend on SAP activity.

marketplaceTour.title: Marketplace home tour
marketplaceTour.summary: Categories, search, product cards, and SAP prices at a glance.
marketplaceTour.p1: Use top categories and search to find items; cards show SAP price and stock.

wrongNetworkFix.title: Wrong network selected
wrongNetworkFix.summary: Switch to a supported network in the wallet, then reconnect the site.
wrongNetworkFix.p1: If you see a network mismatch, pick the recommended chain, refresh, and connect again.

tokenApprovalRevoke.title: Manage token approvals
tokenApprovalRevoke.summary: Review and revoke unused Approve permissions in the wallet or explorer.
tokenApprovalRevoke.p1: First swap needs token approval. Revoke approvals you no longer need.

swapFailed.title: Why swaps fail
swapFailed.summary: Low balance, slippage, missing approval, or congestion can cause failures.
swapFailed.p1: Check amount, slippage, and approval; inspect failed txs in wallet history.

exchangeLimits.title: Swap limits and settlement time
exchangeLimits.summary: Per-tx and daily limits are shown on Exchange; settlement waits for confirmations.
exchangeLimits.p1: Large swaps may need extra confirmation. Timing depends on network speed.

cartAndCheckout.title: Cart and checkout
cartAndCheckout.summary: Combine items in one order; confirm SAP balance and gas before paying.
cartAndCheckout.p1: Review the cart, then sign payment in the wallet on the checkout page.

paymentPending.title: Payment stuck on pending
paymentPending.summary: Pending means the tx is not confirmed yet—do not pay twice.
paymentPending.p1: Check TxHash and confirmations in history; contact support with the hash if it takes too long.

contactSupport.title: Contact support
contactSupport.summary: Reach us by email, Discord, or Telegram with order ID and TxHash.
contactSupport.p1: Include wallet address, order ID, and transaction hash so we can investigate faster.

proposalBasics.title: Where to find DAO proposals
proposalBasics.summary: Browse active, passed, and past proposals under Community.
proposalBasics.p1: Open Community for the proposal list and read full details before voting.
